office_does: The assessor values taxable property, maintains property records and maps, and calculates levy rates under state law.
race_blurb: Incumbent Bruce Walker faces Jeffrey Phelan, for whom only filing-level information was located.

candidates.summary: Walker is the incumbent assessor with a documented record administering valuation, records, mapping, and levy calculation.
highlights: Current county records verify his incumbency [S1][S2][S3]
The office emphasizes equitable valuation and accurate accessible records [S2]

experience.basis: Incumbency and direct administration of the assessor's statutory functions support the proven-record pole.

candidates.summary: Phelan's candidacy is verified, but no identity-safe professional biography or detailed platform was located.
highlights: Official and local sources verify the candidacy [S1][S2]
